title: Master GoHighLevel's New Mobile App v4.0.0 — Manage Faster
description: Master GoHighLevel Mobile App v4.0.0 with Universal Search, Ask AI, dark mode, and faster navigation. Manage your agency business on the go. Free 30-day trial.
html_content:
If you're running an agency or managing clients remotely, you already know the pain: juggling conversations, tasks, and pipelines across multiple devices kills productivity. GoHighLevel's completely redesigned Mobile App v4.0.0 changes that. After years of development, this isn't just an update—it's a full reimagining of how you manage your business on the go. With a modern UI that mirrors the web app, dark mode, Universal Search, and AI-powered features, you can now control your entire agency from your phone as effectively as from your desktop. Ready to see what's possible? Start your free 30-day trial and experience the speed and intelligence improvements firsthand.

📋 In This Guide

  • The Revamped Mobile App Experience: What's New in v4.0.0
  • Universal Search: Find Anything in Seconds
  • Ask AI: Your Mobile Assistant for Faster Decision-Making
  • Modern UI and Dark Mode: Built for Speed and Usability
  • Managing Conversations, Tasks, and Pipelines on the Go
  • How to Enable Labs and Maximize Mobile v4.0.0
  • Why Mobile v4.0.0 Matters for Agency Owners

The Revamped Mobile App Experience: What's New in v4.0.0

GoHighLevel's Mobile App v4.0.0 represents a complete ground-up redesign. This isn't a minor update—it's a reimagining of how you interact with your CRM, automations, and client data when you're away from your desk.

The redesigned interface now aligns seamlessly with GoHighLevel's web app. This consistency means there's zero learning curve if you're already familiar with the desktop version. Navigation feels natural, buttons are in expected places, and the overall visual language is clean and modern. You get the full power of your CRM in a form factor designed specifically for mobile use.

Key improvements include:

  • Faster Navigation: The redesigned menu structure lets you reach critical features in fewer taps.
  • Improved Performance: The app launches faster and handles data syncing more efficiently.
  • Responsive Design: Works flawlessly on all screen sizes, from older phones to the latest flagships.
  • Dark Mode: Reduce eye strain during long work sessions and preserve battery life on OLED devices.
  • Intuitive Controls: Gestures and touch interactions feel native to mobile, not like a shrunk-down web app.

💡 Pro Tip

Enable dark mode in your GoHighLevel mobile app settings if you manage clients late into the evening or early mornings. This reduces eye fatigue and helps you stay sharp during critical decision-making moments.

Universal Search: Find Anything in Seconds

Universal Search is one of the most powerful additions to mobile v4.0.0. Instead of drilling through menus to find a contact, conversation, pipeline, or automation, you can now search across your entire GoHighLevel workspace from a single search bar.

This feature is a game-changer for agency owners managing dozens of clients. Imagine you're at a client meeting and they ask about a specific lead. Instead of fumbling through folders, you open Universal Search, type the lead's name, and have the information in seconds. The search results pull from conversations, contacts, tasks, and more—all in one place.

Universal Search uses intelligent indexing to surface the most relevant results first, so you rarely have to scroll through irrelevant data. It works even if you're offline, pulling from your locally cached data.

Ask AI: Your Mobile Assistant for Faster Decision-Making

Ask AI brings artificial intelligence directly to your mobile app, allowing you to get answers and insights without leaving the app or waiting to get back to your desktop.

Here's what Ask AI can do for you on mobile:

  • Generate Copy: Stuck on how to respond to a client message? Ask AI writes professional responses tailored to your tone.
  • Analyze Data: Ask questions about your contacts, conversations, and performance metrics in natural language.
  • Automate Tasks: Get recommendations on which tasks to automate next based on your workflow patterns.
  • Quick Insights: Understand trends in your sales pipeline or client engagement without opening reports.

The AI understands your GoHighLevel workspace context, so it gives you relevant, actionable advice specific to your business—not generic suggestions.

Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 Days

Double the standard trial. No credit card required to start.

Start My Free Trial →

Modern UI and Dark Mode: Built for Speed and Usability

The visual overhaul in v4.0.0 is significant. The new UI follows modern design principles: plenty of white space, larger touch targets, clearer hierarchy, and consistent iconography. Every pixel serves a purpose—nothing is wasted.

Dark mode isn't just a cosmetic feature. For users working in low-light environments or managing their agency at odd hours, dark mode reduces eye strain substantially. It also extends battery life on phones with OLED screens, which can matter when you're traveling and don't have access to charging.

The design language now matches the web app exactly, creating a unified experience whether you're on desktop or mobile. This consistency trains your muscle memory, so switching between devices feels seamless.

Managing Conversations, Tasks, and Pipelines on the Go

Mobile v4.0.0 gives you full access to the three core elements of agency management: conversations, tasks, and pipelines.

Conversations: All your client messages—SMS, email, WhatsApp, and more—come through in one unified inbox. You can reply, forward, or assign to team members directly from your phone. The redesigned conversation view is cleaner and easier to scan, so you catch important details faster.

Tasks: Create, assign, and track tasks from anywhere. The mobile task interface now shows priority, due dates, and assigned team members more prominently, so you can prioritize work at a glance. Tap to edit, swipe to mark complete.

Pipelines: The redesigned pipeline view on mobile now matches the card-based approach on web. Drag deals between stages, update details, and collaborate with your team without feeling constrained by a small screen. The layout adapts intelligently to your phone's orientation.

💡 Pro Tip

Use the swipe gestures in the mobile app to speed up workflow. Swipe left to complete a task, swipe right to snooze it. These micro-optimizations add up to significant time savings over a week.

How to Enable Labs and Maximize Mobile v4.0.0

GoHighLevel rolled out v4.0.0 gradually through a Labs feature, allowing users to opt-in and test new functionality before full release. If you haven't already switched to the new version, here's how to enable it:

  1. Open the GoHighLevel mobile app and navigate to Settings
  2. Scroll to Labs or Experimental Features
  3. Toggle Mobile App v4.0.0 to On
  4. Restart the app

Important: Mark December 31st, 2025 on your calendar. After this date, the old mobile app will be fully deprecated. If you haven't already migrated to v4.0.0, you'll be automatically switched over. The good news? You have plenty of time to get comfortable with the new interface now.

To maximize your experience with v4.0.0:

  • Enable push notifications for critical updates (leads, high-priority tasks, client messages)
  • Turn on dark mode if you work during evening hours
  • Bookmark your most-used features for quick access
  • Experiment with Universal Search to find your fastest workflows
  • Test Ask AI on non-urgent tasks before relying on it for critical decisions

Why Mobile v4.0.0 Matters for Agency Owners

Running an agency means you're rarely at your desk. You're at client meetings, traveling between locations, or working from coffee shops. In those moments, responsiveness matters. A slow mobile app or one that doesn't have features you need forces you to wait until you're back at your desk—and that delay costs you.

Mobile v4.0.0 changes that equation. The performance improvements mean your app loads instantly. Universal Search means you find information in seconds, not minutes. Ask AI means you can make decisions on the fly without waiting for analysis. Dark mode means you can work longer without fatigue.

For agencies managing multiple clients remotely, this is transformative. Your team stays connected. Your clients get faster responses. Your business runs smoother because the friction of managing it from mobile has been dramatically reduced.

The redesign also signals GoHighLevel's commitment to mobile-first operations. More and more agencies are ditching traditional office setups in favor of remote-first models. A mobile app that's truly powerful—not just a companion to the desktop version—is essential for that shift.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is GoHighLevel's Mobile App v4.0.0 available on both iOS and Android?

Yes, v4.0.0 is available on both platforms simultaneously. GoHighLevel developed the app using a cross-platform framework to ensure feature parity and consistent experience on iOS and Android devices.

Can I manage multiple GoHighLevel accounts from the mobile app?

Yes. You can switch between accounts using the account selector in the app menu. This is especially useful for agencies managing client accounts or those with separate business divisions.

Does the mobile app work offline?

The app caches your most-used data locally, so basic functions like reading conversations and checking tasks work offline. However, real-time features like sending messages or updating records require an internet connection. Changes sync automatically when you reconnect.

What happens if I don't enable the Labs feature before December 31st, 2025?

You'll be automatically migrated to v4.0.0 after the deadline. There's no penalty for waiting, but enabling it early gives you time to learn the interface at your own pace before the mandatory migration.

How much data does the mobile app use?

The redesigned app is more efficient than previous versions. Normal usage (checking messages, updating tasks, browsing contacts) uses minimal data. Heavy usage (uploading files, syncing large contact lists) uses more but still less than typical web browsing. Enable WiFi for large file uploads.
